items.name: Liquidity Monitoring with Real-time Data
items.automation_plan: Automate the data feed integration into L-Scanner and schedule regular updates
items.rationale: No mejora suficiente frente al baseline macro actual.

items.name: Real-time Insider Buying Validation
items.automation_plan: Set up a pipeline to fetch and process real-time insider buying data
items.rationale: El filtrado por insider buys >=2 parece más limpio y defendible.

items.name: Technical Analysis with Real-time Data
items.automation_plan: Automate the integration of real-time market data into T-Analyst
items.rationale: El candidato técnico no genera setups mejores que el baseline.
